item.text: The validator-side gates are green now, and the coder-tree Loom checks re-passed cleanly. I’m closing this out as a PASS-ready WP review and limiting the closeout to the remaining packet-closure and downstream integration-validator steps.

items.text: Inspect current coder worktree diff and scope cleanliness
Review PostgreSQL search fix and new conformance coverage against packet/spec
Run validator gates and strongest available Loom-focused tests
Issue PASS/FAIL verdict with closure steps or findings

item.text:
LIFECYCLE [CX-LIFE-001]
- WP_ID: `WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1`
- STAGE: `VALIDATION`
- NEXT: `INTEGRATION_VALIDATOR`

PASS-ready.

I did not find any remaining substantive WP-scope issues in the current Loom feature diff. On product scope, the live diff is confined to the Loom allowlist at [WP packet:324](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L324) through [WP packet:334](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L334). The prior PostgreSQL search portability drift is fixed by narrowing the derived-field search surface to `full_text_index` at [postgres.rs:2390](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/postgres.rs#L2390) through [postgres.rs:2394](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/postgres.rs#L2394), and the shared negative metadata-only search assertion is present at [storage/tests.rs:1114](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L1114) through [storage/tests.rs:1127](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L1127). Cross-provider Loom conformance remains wired at [storage_conformance.rs:32](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/storage_conformance.rs#L32) and [storage_conformance.rs:40](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/storage_conformance.rs#L40), with portability coverage also in [storage/tests.rs:2074](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L2074), [storage/tests.rs:2153](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L2153), [loom_fs.rs:41](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_fs.rs#L41), and [loom_fs.rs:58](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_fs.rs#L58).

**Remaining downstream integration-validator / packet-closure steps**
1. Fill the packet closure sections at [WP packet:438](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L438), [WP packet:441](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L441), [WP packet:444](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L444), [WP packet:472](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L472), [WP packet:478](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L478), and [WP packet:484](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L484) with the actual manifests and evidence from this pass.
2. Append the official WP-validator report to [WP packet:493](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L493).
3. Update the authoritative packet state from [WP packet:77](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L77) and [WP packet:125](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L125) to the validated handoff state, and mirror the final status in WP communications.
4. Hand off to Integration Validator for final technical authority and merge disposition.
